caption: A group of men wearing face masks walks across a paved outdoor plaza toward a modern building with large glass windows and a white overhanging roof. In the foreground, a man wearing a grey polo shirt, dark pants, and a red backpack walks forward; he is seen holding a dark smartphone in his hand as the sequence progresses. Behind him, another man in a grey polo shirt and dark pants walks in the same direction. To the left, a man in a white dress shirt and dark trousers stands stationary, observing the others. The setting features palm trees, manicured conical shrubs, and a low water feature. A white circular logo featuring a crown is visible in the upper right corner of the scene. As the action unfolds, the men move closer to the camera, with the lead man stepping forward while the background figures shift positions slightly.
